segments.text: I will praise you, Lord, with all my heart; before the "gods" I will sing your praise.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: I will bow down toward your holy temple and will praise your name for your unfailing love and your faithfulness, for you have so exalted your solemn decree that it surpasses your fame.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: When I called, you answered me; you greatly emboldened me.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: May all the kings of the earth praise you, Lord, when they hear what you have decreed.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: May they sing of the ways of the Lord, for the glory of the Lord is great.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: Though the Lord is exalted, he looks kindly on the lowly; though lofty, he sees them from afar.
Though I walk in the midst of trouble, you preserve my life. You stretch out your hand against the anger of my foes; with your right hand you save me.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: The Lord will vindicate me; your love, Lord, endures forever— do not abandon the works of your hands.
segments.speaker: David
